## Chapter / Section Affected
<!-- Which chapter or system component does this proposal affect? -->

## Current Design
<!-- Briefly describe how the current specification handles this -->

## Proposed Change
<!-- Describe your proposed alternative or improvement -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Trade-offs
<!-- What are the trade-offs of your proposal vs the current design? -->

## References
<!-- Any papers, projects, or real-world deployments that support this proposal? -->

## Implementation Complexity
- [ ] Low — drop-in replacement
- [ ] Medium — requires changes across multiple components
- [ ] High — fundamental architectural change
